subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1910-01-01
subcodes.first_line: The Christ is the central point of the Holy Spirit; he was born of the Holy Spirit... The focus of the rays of the Sun of Reality was Christ... Jesus was the sun and his rays shone upon his disciples through his teachings.
subcodes.subjects: @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @Manifestation of God as recipient of divine revelation; Holy Spirit, @The Holy Spirit, @Manifestation of God as sun
